scope: /vehicles filter sidebar — dynamic-option architecture and accordion section-state audit

filter_inventory.note: FIXED this audit — was a hardcoded 4-item array, now options.fuels

hardcoded_occurrences_discovered.action: removed; replaced with options.fuels.map(...) + resolveFuelIcon presentation resolver
replaced with controlled value/onValueChange derived from committed active-filter sections

hardcoded_occurrences_discovered.reason: server-side ingestion-time normalization only; lookup() falls back to raw.trim() for unmapped values; never gates which distinct DB values the filter UI renders
bilingual search-discovery metadata only; colorMatchesSearch always falls back to raw-value substring match; never used as a query value or option gate
every resolver has a safe fallback icon (Cog/Car/FuelIcon); unknown raw values never fail to render
prose example inside a code comment, not a data value

accordion_state_audit.owner: single local React state `openSections: string[]` in VehicleFilters, controlling the one shared Accordion instance rendered by both the mobile Sheet and desktop aside
accordion_state_audit.initial_state_policy: open iff section has >=1 committed active filter chip at first render; identical computation on server (SSR via useSearchParams) and client — no hydration flip
accordion_state_audit.reconciliation_policy: on every activeChips change: if zero sections are now active, force-close all sections (covers clear-all and 'removed last chip manually'); otherwise diff previous vs current active-section sets and only toggle the sections that actually transitioned, leaving unrelated manually-opened/closed sections untouched
accordion_state_audit.multi_filter_url_result: only the sections owning an active filter open (verified: fuel+color+km => exactly those 3)
accordion_state_audit.clear_all_result: every section closes, including a manually-opened section with no active filter
accordion_state_audit.back_result: restores exactly the sections with restored active filters, closes ones no longer active
accordion_state_audit.hard_refresh_result: correct on first paint, no flicker
accordion_state_audit.hydration_result: no console errors/warnings observed on a 3-filter direct URL load

synthetic_option_tests.method: service-layer pure-function unit tests (Node built-in test runner, existing framework) against buildPublicFilterWhere and color-search.ts — no synthetic rows inserted into any database
synthetic_option_tests.results: all synthetic values reach the Prisma where-predicate as plain field values (in/equals), identical code path to known values; no allowlist rejection observed

active_chip_test_results: PASS — chips generated from committed searchParams via activeChips; verified via live CDP session for maker/fuel/transmission/color/typeOfCar/offers combinations
clear_all_test_results: PASS — resets every NUMERIC_FIELDS/CSV_FIELDS/offerOnly entry plus closes every accordion section
pagination_scope_metadata_test: getPublicFilterOptions() queries are `distinct` over PUBLIC_WHERE (all non-frozen, non-deleted vehicles) — independent of `page`/`pageSize`, confirmed by code inspection (no page/skip/take passed to those queries)
production_build_result: PASS — npm run build succeeded; verified no-filter (all closed) and fuel=Hybrid (Καύσιμο open, dynamic options.fuels rendered) directly against the production server
unresolved_findings: cdn-image.service.integration.test.ts's real-network CDN test fails in this environment — pre-existing, unrelated to /vehicles filters, not modified by this audit
